query: Can you suggest literature on enhanced semantic parsing methods that focus on generating high-quality meaning representations and utilize knowledge-constrained decoding under specific grammar rules?
criteria: semantic parsing knowledge-constrained decoding grammar rules
high-quality meaning representation generation semantic parsing
enhanced semantic parsing methods constrained decoding

title.value: Grammar-Constrained Neural Semantic Parsing with LR Parsers

recommendation_reason.value: our approach is conceptually simpler, adds less computational overhead during inference and integrates seamlessly with current SEQ2SEQ frameworks

supported_research_question.value: we assess how syntactical parsers can be integrated into modern encoder-decoder frameworks

method.value: we implement an attentional SEQ2SEQ model that uses an LR parser to maintain syntactically valid sequences throughout the decoding procedure

data_or_scenario.value: We present preliminary evaluation results against a recurrent SEQ2SEQ baseline on GEOQUERY and ATIS

main_conclusion.value: demonstrate improved performance while enforcing grammatical constraints

limitations.value: We do not require any modifications to standard SEQ2SEQ neural network architectures and make very little assumptions about the inputs and outputs of such models.

relevance_strength.value: Grammar-Constrained Neural Semantic Parsing with LR Parsers

title.value: Benchmarking Meaning Representations in Neural Semantic Parsing

recommendation_reason.value: grammar rules heavily impact the performance of different meaning representations.

supported_research_question.value: the impact of meaning representation on semantic parsing is less understood.

method.value: UNIMER, a new unified benchmark on meaning representations

data_or_scenario.value: over three datasets × four meaning representations

main_conclusion.value: neural semantic parsing approaches exhibit notably different performance when they are trained to generate different meaning representations.

limitations.value: Although researchers have designed a lot of meaning representations, recent work focuses on only a few of them.

relevance_strength.value: grammar rules heavily impact the performance of different meaning representations.

title.value: Language to Logical Form with Neural Attention

recommendation_reason.value: In this paper we present a general method based on an attention-enhanced encoder-decoder model.

supported_research_question.value: Semantic parsing aims at mapping natural language to machine interpretable meaning representations.

main_conclusion.value: our approach performs competitively without using hand-engineered features

limitations.value: There has recently been a surge of interest in developing machine learning methods for semantic parsing (see the references in Section 2), due in part to the existence of corpora containing utterances annotated with formal meaning representations.

relevance_strength.value: generate their logical forms by conditioning the output sequences or trees on the encoding vectors

matrix.title: Grammar-Constrained Neural Semantic Parsing with LR Parsers

cells.criterion: semantic parsing knowledge-constrained decoding grammar rules
cells.snippet: Target meaning representations for semantic parsing tasks are often based on programming or query languages, such as SQL, and can be formalized by a context-free grammar.
